business_cannot_create_invitation: Business accounts cannot create or publish invitations.
business_contact_email_hint: This is usually the same email you used to register — signup requires email and password. You can edit it if your public contact should be different.
business_email_verify_banner_desc: Your business works in the app, but it stays hidden from the Partners page and public discovery until you verify your email. Changing your email requires verifying the new address.
business_email_verify_banner_title: Verify your email to appear publicly
business_hours_imported: Opening hours loaded from Google. You can edit them later on your profile.
business_profile_not_public_until_email: This page is not shown to the public until the business verifies their email. The owner can still open and edit their profile from the business dashboard.
business_publish_need_verify_desc: After you verify, you can publish your profile below or hide it anytime (e.g. vacation).
business_publish_verify_email_first: Verify your email before publishing to the Partners page.
business_signup_failed_generic: Failed to create business account. Please try again.
business_signup_permission_denied: Could not save your business profile (access denied). If you already use this email as a personal account, sign out and register the business with a new email.
business_signup_requires_new_account: A business profile must use its own registration. Sign out first to create a business account with a different email.
business_signup_sign_out_first_title: Sign out to create a business
business_verify_reminder_inline: We sent a verification link to your email. You can finish this form now; verify when ready to appear publicly.
business_verify_signin_body: Sign in with the password you created to continue setting up your business profile.
cannot_remove_age_group: Cannot remove a previously selected age group. You can only add more.
cannot_remove_gender_group: Cannot remove a previously selected group. You can only add more.
city_auto_detected: City (detected from your location — you can only register in this city)
city_from_google_only: Only cities that exist on Google Maps can be selected.
clipboard_error: Cannot read clipboard. Please paste manually.
code_backup_desc: Create restore points for your codebase and revert changes instantly.
complete_profile_desc: Please provide a few details to get the best experience.
dating_one_person_selected: Your date is selected. Remove to choose someone else.
draft_modal_description: Don't worry, we've safely saved everything you did as a draft so your work isn't lost. Take your time, and once you join as a partner your new look will be published instantly for your customers!
draft_modal_title: Your profile is starting to look amazing! ✨
enable_push_desc: Get instant updates for new messages, invitations, and bookings.
engagement_tooltip: Likes and comments on your community posts
error_saving_profile: Error saving profile. Please try again.
failed_save_draft: Could not save draft. Try again, or sign in with a personal account (business accounts cannot create public invitations).
for_unregistered_venues: For venues not yet on DineBuddies
ios_push_desc: To receive notifications on iPhone, tap the Share icon below and select "Add to Home Screen".
like_failed: Could not update like. Try again.
no_members_yet: No members yet. Share your community to grow.
notifications_failed: Failed to enable notifications. Permission might have been denied.
post_failed: Failed to create post. Try again.
push_enable_failed: Please allow notifications in your browser settings.
push_enabled_success: Push notifications enabled for this device.
rankings_no_in_scope: No businesses in this area. Try Global.
save_then_share: Save then share on WhatsApp / Instagram
search_place_placeholder: Search for restaurants, cafes, or venues near you
share_limit_recipient: You have already shared this item with the same recipient today.
share_limit_total: You have reached the maximum (3 times) for sharing this item today.
sign_out_failed: Could not sign out. Try again.
unpublished_business_reminder_desc: Please publish it from your dashboard so customers can find you.
unpublished_business_reminder_title: Your business is currently unpublished or hidden
warning_permanent_demographics_short: Gender and age category cannot be changed after saving.
business_address_same_city: Business address must be in {{city}}. You are registering from this city only.
location_detection_failed: We could not detect your city. Please enable location access or try again.
media_upload_failed: Failed to upload media. Try again.
name: Name
please_fill_required_fields: Please fill in all required fields
please_invite_at_least_one_guest: Please invite at least one guest for a private invitation
please_invite_one_person: Please invite someone for your date
publish_permission_denied: Publishing failed: your account does not have permission to update this invitation.
